name: dental-qa-app
description: Static dental Q&A learning app development helpers.

scripts.test:e2e:authenticated: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-dental-qa --only auth,firestore,storage "playwright test --project='Desktop Chromium' --grep @authenticated"
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:rules && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e:authenticated
